sizeEntry.name: Size:
entries: Medium (about 5-7 feet tall)

entries.name: Breath Weapon
entries: As an {@variantrule Action|XPHB}, you exhale fire in either a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} or a 30-foot {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line} that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw ({@dc 8} plus your Charisma modifier and {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}). On a failed save, a creature takes {@damage 1d10} fire damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by {@damage 1d10} when you reach character levels 5 ({@damage 2d10}), 11 ({@damage 3d10}), and 17 ({@damage 4d10}).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

entries.name: Damage Resistance
entries: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to fire damage.

entries.name: Darkvision
entries: You have {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} with a range of 60 feet.

entries.name: Light Bearer
entries: You know the {@spell Light|XPHB} cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

entries.name: Draconic Wings
entries: Because of two leathery wings on your back, you have a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} equal to twice your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}. You can't use this flying speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.

entries.name: Celestial Revelation
entries: When you reach character level 3, you can transform as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} using one of the options below (choose the option each time you transform). The transformation lasts for 1 minute or until you end it (no action required). Once you transform, you can't do so again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

Once on each of your turns before the transformation ends, you can deal extra damage to one target when you deal damage to it with an attack or a spell. The extra damage equals your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, and the extra damage's type is either Fire for Fire and Shadow or Radiant for Inner Radiance.
Here are the transformation options:

items.name: Inner Radiance
entries: Searing light temporarily radiates from your eyes and mouth. For the duration, you shed {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 10 feet, and at the end of each of your turns, each creature within 10 feet of you takes Radiant damage equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}.

items.name: Fire and Shadow
entries: Your eyes briefly become pools of darkness, and fiery wings sprout from your back temporarily. Creatures other than your allies within 10 feet of you must succeed on a Charisma saving throw ({@dc 8} plus your Charisma modifier and {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}) or have the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of your next turn.

item.name: Brandur's Sword Hilt
entries: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

entries.name: Broken Sword
entries: This weapon functions as a {@variantrule Spellcasting Focus |XPHB} and a Warlock's pact weapon.
As a {@variantrule Bonus Action |XPHB}, you can conjure a spectral blade from the hilt to attack with or dismiss it.

entries.name: Multielementalism
entries: When you hit a creature with this weapon, you can choose to deal one of the following damage types instead of the weapons normal damage: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

item.name: Utak's Warhammer
entries: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

item.name: Silencari Dagger
entries: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

entries.name: Mind Controlling
entries: You can cast the {@spell Mind Sliver|XPHB} cantrip from this staff using your spellcasting or pact magic feature.

entries.name: Enthralling
entries: You can add {@dice 1d4} to any {@skill Persuasion|XPHB} you make. On a 4, you can no longer use this feature until you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}.

entries.name: Parrying
entries: When you are hit with a melee attack roll while wielding this staff with two hands, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to add 2 to your AC for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss.

item.name: Homing Compasses
entries: Homing Compasses come in pairs, with each pointing towards the other one as long as both are on the same plane of existence.

entries.name: Heavy Sand
entries: While the bag can hear you, you can make a {@skill Performance|XPHB} check (DC 10) as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to convince the bag of sand to increase its weight to 200 lb. or decrease its weight back to 2 lb..

feat.name: Savage Attacker (5BB)
entries: When you hit with a weapon, you can reroll any 1 or 2 on a damage die and must use the new roll, even if the new roll is a 1 or a 2.

subclassFeature.name: Silencari Assassin
entries: {@i Practice the Grim Art of Death}

An Assassin's training focuses on using stealth, poison, and disguise to eliminate foes with deadly efficiency. While some Rogues who follow this path are hired killers, spies, or bounty hunters, the capabilities of this subclass are equally useful for adventurers facing a variety of monstrous enemies.

entries.subclassFeature: Get in and Get out|Rogue|XPHB|Silencari Assassin|5BBPublic|3|5BBPublic

subclassFeature.name: Get in and Get out
entries: When you attack with a melee weapon, your Sneak Attack uses d8 damage dice instead of d6 damage dice.

subclassFeature.name: Keen Weapon Training
entries: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.
